Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Wow, look at all the decorations...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}And they're so elaborate too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...Oh, over there! Those trees are made entirely of lights.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Brrr. It's a bit chilly, but I'm really glad we came.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}It's just... such a wonderful night, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}Sorry. I didn't really think about what to do after we got here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I, um... I'm happy just being with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Should we go inside? It's getting a little cold out here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I don't want you to catch a cold.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I talked with Fuuka for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I'm having such a good time today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's like a dream. I've come through here so many times before, but today it feels special.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I was thinking of you when I made them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: (Item name) received.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I was originally planning to bake a cake in the spirit of Christmas, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I'm not that good at baking yet, and I didn't want it to taste bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But, I think you'll really like these...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}New Year's Eve is just around the corner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}If I were still my old self, I wouldn't have wanted to think about that... Especially on a day like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Now, I know that time is precious, and I don't want to give up on the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Meeting you was the best thing that ever happened to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Having you with me on this special day... I couldn't be happier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a tender moment with Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}
